user_request: What does the Anthropic pricing page say about Haiku?

messages.content: What does the Anthropic pricing page say about Haiku?
I fetched the Anthropic pricing page. According to the page, Claude Haiku 4.5 is priced at $1 per million input tokens and $5 per million output tokens.
